data.body: Decomposed epic elfish-chair-lug into S1-S6 child stories (bored-tag-sale, urge-brook-plume, will-tile-plum, perky-art-yodel, leafy-vogue-ingot, norm-dam-swab): all parented, all pass clarity/AC/quality gates, dep-linked per epic sequencing, file impacts set for next-batch, run-3 plan-review findings inherited into S1/S2/S3 descriptions. S2 carries make lint/test verify commands. 1fa8 dependency kept at epic level.
